title: Tector
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses}}
'''''Tector''''' was a group of two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During the [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|diplomatic meeting]] between the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] and the Alliance near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]], they boarded the Sullustan transports [[CoSof]] and delivered the abducted Sullustan technicians, just rescued by the Alliance. The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], held off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
